Chris Mason: How will the UK respond to US court verdict on social media?Will the decision of a Los Angeles jury have an impact on the UK government as it considers potential future regulations on social media, writes the BBC's political editor. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0q90kekw08o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0q90kekw08o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 03:40:16 GMT
